text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #2)

I looked at releng/14.0 and the removal of the TI support
(such as BBB) from GENERIC is part of releng/14.0 :

https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/sys/arm/conf/GENERIC?h=releng/14.0&id=3416e102c4e978a394a604012dae1943c7300a1e
